name: io.github.fieldcure/publicdata-kr
description: Korean public data API gateway — discover, describe, and call 80,000+ data.go.kr APIs with automatic serviceKey injection, XML-to-JSON conversion, and error mapping.

environment_variables.name: DATA_GO_KR_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: data.go.kr API key (https://www.data.go.kr 회원가입 후 인증키 발급). If unset, the server will request the key via MCP Elicitation on first tool call (requires an Elicitation-capable client).

environment_variables.name: PUBLICDATA_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Legacy env var name for data.go.kr API key. Retained for backward compatibility; prefer DATA_GO_KR_API_KEY.

environment_variables.name: PUBLICDATA_MAX_RESPONSE_LENGTH
environment_variables.description: Maximum response body length in characters (default: 50000)

required_credentials.help_text: https://www.data.go.kr 에서 회원가입 후 마이페이지에서 인증키를 발급받으세요. 환경변수가 없으면 MCP Elicitation을 지원하는 클라이언트에서는 첫 도구 호출 시 입력 UI가 뜹니다.
